title: Cannot change domain when importing from AD (latest NB)
author: g3m1n1-usa
body_snippet:
I am running the latest nightly build, 2022.01.07-1.77.2-nb, and when I try to import from AD I am unable to change to a different domain. After typing in the domain and clicking the Change button nothing happens and the domain list does not switch.

## Expected Behavior
After typing in the domain FQDN and clicking Change I would expect the domain list to refresh showing the OU structure of the specified domain.

## Current Behavior
Nothing happens after typing in the domain FQDN and click...

iterations.description: The Active Directory import window's domain textbox is not initialized with the user's current domain, leading to confusion and requiring manual intervention to set the domain.

notes:
AI triage (gemini): The Active Directory import window's domain textbox is not initialized with the user's current domain, leading to confusion and requiring manual intervention to set the domain.
Approach: Initialize txtDomain.Text with Environment.UserDomainName in the constructor of ActiveDirectoryImportWindow.cs.
